Damage typeEnergy
Per hit30

Approx. DPS6920shot total + DoT / reload
Heat per sec800
Hits per shot10
TagsDoT, Multi-hit, blaster

Sets targets on fire.

BranchKeyLevel 1 valueLevel 100 valueMeaning

Tech Levels

LevelDescriptionProjectilePrimary MaterialSecondary Material
1Increase rate of fire by 25%. Reduce power consumption by 15%FlameSteel x400n/a
2Increase damage by 40%. Increase flame speed by 10%. FlameSteel x800n/a
3Increase damage by 52%. Reduce power consumption by 10%. Increase flame speed by 10%. FlameSteel x1600n/a
4Increase damage by 64%.FlameSteel x3200Hydrogen Crystal x400
5Increase damage by 66%. FlameSteel x6400Plasma Fluids x200
6Reduce power consumption by 10%. Increase damage by 132%. Increase flame speed by 20%.FlameSteel x12800Iridium x800
